name: Fresh Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 cups tomatoes, peeled and seeded, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a lightly oiled Crock-Pot.
2. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 12 hours or on High for 4 hours.
3. If a thicker sauce is desired, remove the cover and cook on High until the sauce has reduced.
This tomato sauce is versatile and can be used in various recipes that call for tomato sauce. It makes about 5 cups. For a larger batch, double the recipe using a 5-quart Crock-Pot.
